theory.canonical_statement: ID5147 records Thymine Potential Energy Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `TZPID_exports\general_research_workflow\all_edit_equation_arc_compact\paper.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
